content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_explorer

SELECT * FROM
OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'location.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    FIELDTERMINATOR = ';',
    FIELDQUOTE = '\' -- to delete this additional character in the columns
) AS location
